summary: Iteration 161: All Faz1/Faz2/Faz3 features tested and verified. Backend APIs (100% pass rate), frontend UI routes and components working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - created test telemetry events during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Faz1-Faz3 features fully verified. Telemetry endpoints, preset runs export, and release artifact scripts all working.

details.telemetry_create_endpoint: POST /api/admin/revision-redirect-telemetry/events - creates success/failed events with duration, failure_reason fields
details.telemetry_list_endpoint: GET /api/admin/revision-redirect-telemetry - returns items with summary (total, success, failed, avg_duration_ms, p95_duration_ms) and duration_histogram
details.permission_check: Non-admin users (dealer role) receive 403 Forbidden as expected
details.frontend_page: /admin/revision-redirect-telemetry shows title, filters, summary cards, histogram, and table

details.list_endpoint: GET /api/admin/preset-runs returns items with pagination (page, limit, total, has_next)
details.frontend_page: /admin/preset-runs shows Status dropdown, From/To date inputs, Export CSV button

details.default_export: GET /api/admin/preset-runs/export - returns CSV with 9 columns (run_id, operator, executed_at, countries, total_jobs, success_count, failure_count, duration, status)
details.extended_export: GET /api/admin/preset-runs/export?extended=true - adds meta row (meta,schema_version,2) + extra columns (module, persona, variant)
details.frontend_checkbox: extended CSV (schema v2) checkbox present on /admin/preset-runs page

details.endpoint: GET /api/admin/layouts/{revision_id} returns item with page context (id, page_type, country, module)
details.frontend_route: /admin/revisions/:revisionId route exists and redirects to content-builder

details.archive_script: /app/scripts/archive_release_artifacts.sh exists with release_meta.json fields (release_id, is_active, is_rollback_candidate, retention_locked)
details.cleanup_script: /app/scripts/cleanup_release_artifacts.py has retention rules and fail-safe for missing meta

elements.title: Revision Redirect Telemetry
elements.subtitle: Son 50 redirect event, failure reason ve duration dağılımı.
elements.failure_filter: Failure reason dropdown with enum values

revision_redirect_route.behavior: Shows loading state then redirects to content-builder or shows error
